title.en: The ancient demon of Aromu asked.

content.en:
"It's too dangerous, if there is a great danger there, what if the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse falls after entering?"

The ancient demon of Aromu asked.

Several other Ultimate Ancient Demons hesitated, it was indeed extremely dangerous there.

And it is impossible for the space-time bubble to be broken under normal circumstances, and it is difficult for the ultimate ancient demon to break a space-time bubble, so it can only be transformed.

So, how did that space-time bubble burst?

Even if they were omnipotent Ultimate Ancient Demons and top-notch existences, they were at a loss at the moment.

There may be an amazing opportunity there, but there may also be a terrifying crisis, if too many peak ancient demon-level powerhouses fall, then the strength of the main department of the Luo mother will be greatly weakened.

Many times, these ultimate ancient demons can't make a move, and they all need to be presided over by these peak ancient demon-level powerhouses. "Four-Four-Zero"

If these peak ancient demon-level powerhouses lost too much, the main department of the Arrow Mother would undoubtedly be unacceptable.

"It's better to let the Gu Demon-level powerhouse who is not the main department of Ah Luo's mother go over and take a look, if there is not much danger, then let the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse of my clan enter. "The Ancient Demon of the Underworld proposed.

"Yes, that's a good idea. The ancient demon of Aromu agreed.

Although this may allow those ancient demon-level powerhouses to gain some opportunities, no matter what the chance, those tribes cannot threaten the main department of the Arrow.

So, it doesn't hurt to give a little chance.

As a result, the main department of Arrow Mother passed a message that some ancient demon-level powerhouses were asked to explore a dangerous place, and everything was unknown.

Of course, there are also certain requirements for strength, and the lowest is also the top ancient demon level realm, otherwise if the strength is too weak, I am afraid that I will not even have the qualifications to explore.

......

"The main department of the mother of Arrow asked some ancient demon-level powerhouses to explore an unknown place?"

Ye Tian was a little interested.

That place should be very dangerous, otherwise the main department of Ah Luo's mother would definitely let the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses of the headquarters explore, rather than let the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses of the outside tribes explore.

For the first time, Ye Tian came to Ploz.

"Lord Plotz, the main department of Mother Arrow wants to let some ancient demon-level powerhouses explore the unknown land, I wonder if you want to go?"

Ye Tian consulted.

Pleoz shook his head, "I won't go, it may be very dangerous there, and I know my potential very well, becoming an ultimate ancient demon is never possible, at most I can go one step further at the peak ancient demon level." I'd rather spend countless years of penance and a little bit of strength than take risks. Besides, with the order of the main department of the mother of Aluo, other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses would not make a move on me. "

Immediately after, Proz asked, "Could it be the Heavenly Ancient Demon that you want to go?"

"Well, I'm going to give it a try. "

Ye Tiandao.

Proz was a little surprised, he knew Ye Tian's potential very well, and in the future, he would definitely be able to become the top existence of the peak ancient demon level, and it could even be said that he was invincible at the peak ancient demon level.

This kind of existence would even be so risky, even if he cultivated slowly, with Ye Tian's progress speed, it wouldn't be long before he would break through to the peak ancient demon level realm.

Moreover, did he know that Ye Tian had been to the Realm of Friction and Destruction, and he might have gained a lot of benefits, but now that he must be short of resources, why should he take risks?

Of course, he didn't persuade Ye Tian, but just asked Ye Tian to be careful.

......

Arrow's main department.

Ye Tian soon came here, and under the arrangement of the main department of the mother of Aluo, he settled in a palace.

In a flash of time, an ancient demon-level powerhouse came to the main headquarters of the Luo Mother, all willing to explore the unknown place.

this day.

The creator of the main department of the Arrow, the first ultimate ancient demon Arrowmu Ancient Demon appeared.

"I've seen Lord Aromu Ancient Demon!"

A group of ancient demon-level powerhouses said respectfully.

"Very good, you have a total of thirty-six Ancient Demon Level existences, six peak Ancient Demon Levels, and thirty top Ancient Demon Levels, I will take you to that unknown place, after you enter there, you need to come out again in a short time and inform the situation inside. In this way, even if you don't get anything, the main department of Aro will give you some rewards. Aromu said.

"Yes!"

Many ancient demon-level powerhouses responded.

Immediately, with a wave of his hand, many ancient demon-level powerhouses were taken into the palm of his hand by the Aromu Ancient Demon, and then the Aromu Ancient Demon escaped into the endless time and space line.

......

"This is an endless spaceline!"

Ye Tian recognized .0

At this time, the Aromu Ancient Demon was rapidly shuttling through the endless space-time line, the speed was unimaginable, and he easily crossed the space-time bubble one by one and went deep into the endless space-time line.

If Ye Tian broke into the endless space-time line by himself, he would definitely not be able to escape too far, and there would definitely be no way to escape for too long.

But the Aromu Ancient Demon is the ultimate Ancient Demon, and he can travel the endless space-time line at will, and will not merge into the endless space-time line.

Time passed, and the ancient demon of Aromu had not yet reached that place.

"It's too far!"

Ye Tian was shocked, how far away this must be from the Abyss of Arrow's Mother, with the speed of an Ultimate Ancient Demon, it was still shuttling through the endless space-time line for so long.

It can be seen that that place should be very remote, and it was lucky to be discovered by the Aromu Ancient Demon, and even the Aromu Ancient Demon thought it was a treasure land, otherwise the ultimate Ancient Demon like the Aromu Ancient Demon would not personally send them over.

And the other peak ancient demon level also frowned a little, they naturally knew the endless time and space line, and they were also a little panicked about this unknown place.

Only a few top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses were very excited, because they were able to stand in the palm of an Ultimate Ancient Demon, which was also an honor!

As for the danger, they didn't think much about it at all, they had already been mentally prepared, anyway, they felt that they had no hope of breaking through the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, so it was better to give it a go, maybe they would get the opportunity to break through!

After a long time, the ancient demon of Aromu finally arrived at a place where he was located.

5.7 And here, Ye Tian and the others saw a broken space-time bubble, which was much smaller than the normal space-time bubble because it was broken.

"Shattered Space-Time Bubble !!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He had spoken to Proz that the space-time bubble should be indestructible, even the ultimate ancient demon would be difficult to destroy!

Those peak ancient demon-level powerhouses were also stunned, they never expected that the unknown place they were exploring turned out to be a shattered space-time bubble.

"Lord Aromu Ancient Demon, is this a shattered space-time bubble?"

A peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse asked.

"Yes!"

The Alomu Ancient Demon nodded and said.
